title: The Missing Homework
ticket: Grandma says her homework file disappeared before printing.
clue: The file is probably in the wrong folder, not deleted.
tooltip: Use File Explorer search first, then check the file path.
whyItMatters: Users panic when files seem missing. Fast recovery builds trust.
careerConnection: Help desk technicians solve missing file tickets every day.

interactiveDemo.hint: Start with the safest and fastest check.

actionTask.instructions: Search for the homework file, open its location, and move it into a clear Homework folder.
actionTask.expectedResult: The file is found and stored in the right folder.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Explorer showing the file path and the restored folder.

repeatTask: Repeat the search-and-move flow with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Move the file into the wrong folder on purpose, then fix it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Grandma is happy. Homework found and path explained.

translationTerms.plain: The address of a file or folder.
Looking for a file by name.
translationTerms.why: Saves time when folders are messy.
